summary: Tested Dogs Only Party Wizard for The Doggy Company. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verified on both desktop (1920x800) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Unified flow working: party request creates service desk ticket + admin notification + member notification.
critical_code_review_comments: PartyPlanningWizard.jsx correctly implements dogs-only: no Cat import, filters out cats from pet list (line 269)
Backend forces pet_type='dog' in party request (server.py line 13748)
Unified flow creates 4 documents: party_requests, service_desk_tickets, admin_notifications, member_notifications
The Doggy Company branding visible: 'Making every pup's day special!'
No medicine/medical products or services in celebrate pillar
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test party requests via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dogs Only Party Wizard fully functional. Unified flow verified. Mobile and desktop responsive. No cat options in wizard.

dogs_only_wizard.details: Party wizard shows 'Your Dog's Name' input, 'The Doggy Company - Making every pup's day special!' branding. No cat option anywhere. Pets filtered with p.species !== 'cat'.

multi_pet_family_support.details: Wizard auto-populates pets from user profile. Cats are filtered out. Dogs displayed with name, breed, age.

unified_flow.details: Party request creates: 1) party_requests document, 2) service_desk_tickets document (CEL-YYYYMMDD-XXX), 3) admin_notifications document (type: party_request), 4) member_notifications document (type: party_confirmation)

admin_notifications_party_details.details: Admin notifications contain: title with pet name and occasion, message with user name and date, ticket_id, request_id, priority (high for premium/luxury budgets)

mobile_responsiveness_390x844.details: Celebrate page and party wizard work correctly on mobile. No horizontal overflow. Wizard modal width 358px fits in 390px viewport. Buttons stack vertically.

desktop_responsiveness_1920x800.details: Celebrate page displays correctly on desktop. Party wizard modal centered. 6-step progress indicators visible.

no_medicine_in_celebrate.details: Celebrate pillar products and services contain no medicine/medication/pharmaceutical items. All services are party/celebration focused.

screenshots_taken: celebrate_desktop_196.png - Desktop view of celebrate page
party_wizard_desktop_196.png - Party wizard on desktop showing dogs-only input
celebrate_mobile_196.png - Mobile view of celebrate page (390x844)
party_wizard_mobile_196.png - Party wizard on mobile showing dogs-only input

code_verification.no_cat_import: Verified: No Cat icon import in PartyPlanningWizard.jsx
code_verification.cat_filter: Line 269: pets.filter(p => p.species !== 'cat') correctly filters out cats
code_verification.dog_branding: Line 341: 'The Doggy Company - Making every pup's day special!'
code_verification.backend_dog_only: Line 13748: pet_type: 'dog' hardcoded in party request
